100: 〉 Beyond the door, you find a 
young man surrounded by enemies.
[->]〉 It seems he is one of the other 
messiahs.
[END]
101: (Aleph) [7a 418]You're the one from my dream! I see.
You must be whom Stephen spoke of.
[END]
102: 〉 Aleph glances at you while fighting
off the enemies surrounding him.
[->]〉 Will you help Aleph?
[END]
103: Help him
Hang back and watch
[END]
104: 〉 You leap into the fray and cut down
one of the enemies.
[END]
105: (Aleph) [7a 418]Hey−−Heh, I see. You're no ordinary
kid, are you?
[END]
106: 〉 Aleph nods at you.
[END]
107: (Aleph) [7a 418][7b 1048993, 65537]Sorry to ask, but... mind helping
me with these guys?
[END]
108: 〉 You decide to hang back and 
watch.
[END]
109: (Aleph) [7a 418]You're a good boy!
[END]
110: 〉 Aleph turns back, and with nimble 
footwork toys with the enemies in 
front of him.
[->]〉 It doesn't really seem like he
needs your help.
[END]
111: 〉 Suddenly, a horde of enemies 
attacks you from above!
[END]
112: 〉 As soon as he finishes his sentence, 
Aleph attacks the nearest enemy.
[->]〉 You ready your weapon and turn to
face the enemies.
[END]
200: (Aleph) [7a 417]You're quite good...
[END]
201: 〉 Aleph, having finished off his own
enemies, walks over to you.
[END]
202: (Aleph) [7a 417]I thought I died, burned away by
the Megiddo Ark...
[->]Why am I here? Do you know what's
going on?
[END]
203: 〉 You explain the situation to Aleph.
[END]
204: (Aleph) [7a 417][7b 65953, 65537]I see... In that case, I should go 
see En no Ozuno.
[->][7b 1048993, 65537]I'll go on ahead. See you later.
[END]
205: 〉 Aleph walks off.
[->]〉 You find a glowing, blue key in 
the center of the room.
[->]〉 You obtain the [Color:0x5]Blue Key[Color:0x0].
[END]
1000: 〉 The room is silent.
[END]
